session.user:
Run ruff check and format on the whole codebase. Commands: 1. ruff check --fix src/ packages/ tests/ 2. ruff format src/ packages/ tests/
Report any issues.
session.assistant: I'll run ruff check with --fix and then ruff format on the codebase for you.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check --fix src/ packages/ tests/
Run ruff check with --fix on all code directories

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff format src/ packages/ tests/
Run ruff format on all code directories

session.assistant:
**Ruff check and format completed successfully:**
- **ruff check --fix**: All checks passed! (no violations found or fixed) - **ruff format**: 1654 files left unchanged (codebase is already properly formatted)
No issues were detected. The codebase is clean and follows all ruff linting and formatting rules.
